content: KairoTask - Next.js project management app with Supabase backend. Tech: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, next-intl (i18n). Directories: app/ (pages), components/ (UI), hooks/ (data fetching), lib/ (utilities), store/ (state), supabase/ (migrations), tests/
21 runtime deps, 11 dev deps. Key: next, react, @supabase/supabase-js, next-intl, framer-motion, lucide-react, zustand, recharts, @dnd-kit, date-fns, sonner

Next.js App Router with route groups: (auth), (dashboard), (landing), (legal). Pages: login, register, forgot-password, dashboard, projects/[projectId], console, metrics, profile, settings, team, privacy. Components organized by domain: auth/, project/, task/, search/, ui/, custom/. Hooks for data fetching with Zustand stores.
projects/[projectId]/page.tsx: Cyclomatic=20, Cognitive=49, LOC=674 (most complex file). team/page.tsx: Cyclo=10, Cogni=27, LOC=348. profile/page.tsx: Cyclo=9, Cogni=25, LOC=249.

36 functions extracted from app/. Key pages: ForgotPasswordPage, LoginPage, RegisterPage, DashboardPage, ProfilePage, ProjectsPage, SettingsPage, TeamPage, Home (landing). Project page has 9 handlers: handleClick, handleDeleteProject, handleInviteMember, handleSaveSettings, load, togglePanel.
No circular dependencies found in app/, components/, hooks/, lib/, store/.
Top imports: next (10 uses), next/link (9), next-intl (8), lucide-react (8), framer-motion (6), react (5), @/hooks/useProjects (4), @/lib/supabase/client (4). Path alias @/ maps to project root.

159 functions across 64 files. Key components: ConsoleEasterEgg, MatrixRain (ascii), AuthBackLink, ForgotPasswordForm, LoginForm, RegisterForm, PasswordModal (auth), Terminal (console), AnimatedTabTitle, AnoAI, BentoFeatures, MatrixRainBackground, RadialOrbitalTimeline, SnakeGridBackground (custom), PomodoroTimer, PomodoroSessionList (pomodoro), ExportImportModal, GanttChart, GlobalActivityFeed, KanbanBoard, SprintPanel (project), GlobalSearchModal, SearchTrigger (search), CommentsSection, CreateTaskModal, CustomFieldValuesEditor, TaskAttachments, TaskCard, TaskDependenciesPanel, TaskDetailModal (task), AuthCard (auth layout), AvatarUpload, ErrorBoundary, Skeleton, ThemeProvider, QueryProvider
Terminal.tsx: Cyclo=35, Cogni=81, LOC=271 (VERY COMPLEX). GlobalSearchModal.tsx: Cyclo=19, Cogni=50, LOC=236. PasswordModal.tsx: Cyclo=16, Cogni=35, LOC=216.

app/ (26 pages - auth, dashboard, landing, legal routes), components/ (64 files - ascii, auth, console, custom, pomodoro, project, search, task, ui), hooks/ (18 files - useActivities, useActivityLog, useBurndown, useCustomFields, useGlobalActivity, useGlobalSearch, useInvitations, useNotificationPreferences, useNotifications, usePomodoroSessions, useProjectMembers, useProjects, useSprints, useTaskAttachments, useTaskComments, useTaskDependencies, useTasks, useWebhooks), lib/ (utilities - supabase client/server/middleware, API helpers), store/ (Zustand stores - useSearchStore), supabase/migrations/ (9 SQL migrations), i18n/ (next-intl setup), tests/ (vitest/playwright), doc/ (project documentation)
No circular dependencies found in codebase (app/, components/, hooks/, lib/, store/)
